commit_scope: Repair the production kernel-router native mutation carrier so public-gate and native-default POST/PATCH routes parse the compact request body shape and emit valid JSONB property payloads instead of casting quote-stripped request bodies.

commands: Copy-Item form/form-kernel-rust/target/release/form-kernel-rust.exe to target/release/form-kernel-rust for the Unix-path harness expectation
python direct Rust serve smoke: production-routes.fk booted with 45 native routes including /api/spec-registry/source-list and mutation route-choice rows
local_validation.notes: The direct Windows HTTP listener accepted sockets but timed out for /health and POST probes, so local HTTP response proof remains a Windows carrier gap. The Linux/Postgres mutation_public_gate_harness.py path skipped locally because initdb is not installed. api/.venv pytest for api/tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py had four passing static checks and four Windows launcher/script expectation failures unrelated to this route edit.

ci_validation.notes: CI and the Hostinger deploy workflow must run the Linux route and public canary proof after this branch is pushed.

deploy_validation.notes: Current public SHA a1b2f12f14b284c1d11ddbec53bc7abd2fdfb89a reaches native-kernel for POST /api/ideas after settling but returns 503 with pg_exec invalid JSON because properties were emitted from a quote-stripped request body. This commit should change that to 202 with native persistence.

phase_gate.reason: Local static/build/boot proof passed; PR checks, Hostinger deploy, and public kernel canary proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27976799948 deployed a1b2f12f14b284c1d11ddbec53bc7abd2fdfb89a and passed public deployment verification, then failed Verify kernel public canary with repeated 422 router=none during the initial settling window.

After settling, public POST /api/ideas with X-Form-Native-Public-Gate reached X-Form-Router: native-kernel but returned 503. The body showed persistence.stage=pg_exec and error invalid input syntax for type json, with SQL casting '{id:idea-probe...,name:...}'::jsonb.

The same public probe showed explicit X-Form-Python-Fallback remained observable as fanout-python and Accept-bearing GET /api/attention/kernel-runtime remained native-kernel api_attention_kernel_runtime.

The edited production-routes.fk now uses mpv-flat-body-value-or as a fallback for compact request bodies and emits mpv-idea-properties-json/mpv-spec-properties-json into mpv-jsonb for native mutation SQL.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public X-Form-Native-Public-Gate and no-header native default mutation canaries should execute native persistence and return 202 with decision/native-invitation receipts after deploy.
test_flows: production manifest boots with source-list and mutation routes bound.
Hostinger Auto Deploy reaches Verify kernel public canary.
